executives.name: Nader El-Sayed
executives.background: Mr El-Sayed is a Certified Practising Accountant and a Director of Multi-Purpose Business Solutions, a boutique accounting and business advisory firm. He has over 20 years of experience in the areas of corporate compliance, financial accounting, and taxation. He is also a Non-Executive Director of several ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: David Wheeler
board_of_directors.background: Mr Wheeler has more than 30 years of Executive and Non-Executive Director experience in Australia and internationally. He is a Fellow of the Australian Institute of Company Directors and has experience in capital markets, corporate advisory, and strategic management.

board_of_directors.name: Nader El-Sayed
board_of_directors.background: Mr El-Sayed is a Certified Practising Accountant and a Director of Multi-Purpose Business Solutions. He has over 20 years of experience in corporate compliance and financial accounting.

board_of_directors.name: Joe Graziano
board_of_directors.background: Mr Graziano is a qualified Chartered Accountant with over 30 years of experience in corporate advisory and financial management. He has served as a director and company secretary for several ASX-listed companies.
